messages: This is a Rust-based multi-service platform organized around a monorepo of crates, a UI folder for the web interface, and various configuration, script, and service management files that support running adapters for different chat platforms (Telegram, WhatsApp, Feishu/Lark, etc.) together under a unified service architecture.
result_json.text: This is a Rust-based multi-service platform organized around a monorepo of crates, a UI folder for the web interface, and various configuration, script, and service management files that support running adapters for different chat platforms (Telegram, WhatsApp, Feishu/Lark, etc.) together under a unified service architecture.
